title: Register for monday Evolve in Chicago!
excerpt:

posts.author: bridget.monday (Bridget P.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Calling all Chicago-based monday.com enthusiasts! Join industry leaders and fellow monday.com customers for a day of educational sessions, peer-learning, and networking.

The event will include a firsthand look at how fellow peers are streamlining their processes, efficiently managing resources, and saving time along the way.

Strengthen your skillset for the new world of work. Whether you’re new to monday.com or are a seasoned veteran — flex new skills with monday.com masterclasses while networking with industry peers and thought leaders.

Register here!

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bridget P.:

Calling all Chicago-based enthusiasts! Join industry leaders and fellow customers for a day of educational sessions, peer-learning, and networking.

The event will include a firsthand look at how fellow peers are streamlining their processes, efficiently managing resources, and saving time along the way.

Strengthen your skillset for the new world of work. Whether you’re new to (htt://monday) or are a seasoned veteran — flex new skills with masterclasses while networking with industry peers and thought leaders.

Sounds like a fantastic opportunity to learn and grow! Whether you’re just starting out with monday or you’re an experienced user, it’s always great to gain insights from industry leaders and peers. Looking forward to hearing how others are streamlining their processes and leveraging monday for better efficiency. The masterclasses should be especially helpful for sharpening skills!.
